user.title: SISMASENS — Device Setup
user.description: Enter the ESPHome device prefix (e.g. `mi-001`). The integration will look for entities like `sensor.mi_001_earthquake` already present in Home Assistant.

cloud.title: SISMASENS — Cloud Publishing (optional)
cloud.description: Enable cloud publishing to share your seismic data on the SISMASENS network. Register at {register_url} to get your token.

error.device_not_found: Device not found. Make sure the ESPHome device is integrated in Home Assistant and the prefix is correct (e.g. mi-001).
error.token_required: A token is required when cloud publishing is enabled.
